title: Draftelier Designer Manuscript Lexicon
subtitle: Hand-drawn reinforcement trigger words for style-specific LoRA training

styles.manuscript_trigger_words: vintage fashion croquis, original designer sketch, delicate graphite pencil construction lines, translucent soft watercolor wash, unfinished paper edges, 1950s haute couture manuscript, sweeping hourglass curves

architectural fashion sketch, original atelier manuscript, cool precise graphite contour lines, restrained flat gouache wash, visible proportion lines, clean white paper background, minimalist structural tailoring cues

avant-garde fashion illustration, eccentric designer sketch, sharp aggressive black India ink, striking luminous metallic gold leaf accents, surreal croquis, rough art paper, trompe l'oeil drafting details
fast backstage fashion sketch, rapid thick black marker strokes, pastel smudges, dynamic white correction-fluid (Tipp-Ex) highlights, messy spontaneous croquis, designer's notebook page

sci-fi fashion croquis, sharp fineliner pen sketch, glossy reflective marker highlights, hyper-exaggerated hourglass proportions, dramatic runway manuscript, engineered structural detail, sharp technical drawing
chaotic romantic fashion sketch, expressive swirling ink linework, lavish opulent watercolor layering, embellished historical dressmaking annotations, artist's sketchbook page, theatrical manuscript
cabaret fashion croquis, precise tattoo-like black contour lines, intricate ballpoint pen corsetry seam notation, body-conscious sketch, subversive atelier manuscript, ballpoint pen draft
rebellious punk fashion sketch, anarchic biro ballpoint pen scratches, sketchy ink lines, collage-like color blocking, rough DIY croquis, torn paper aesthetic, subverted tailoring draft
deconstructed fashion manuscript, ghostly faint graphite outlines, deliberately erased construction marks, visible basting stitches, grayscale xerox-like paper texture, anonymous pattern-study sketch
bionic fashion draft, kinetic wireframe grids, meticulous ultra-fine technical drafting pen lines, 3D parametric geometry, clean blueprint-like sketch page, techno-couture manuscript
fluid fashion croquis, airy sweeping graphite lines, precise micro-pleat notation, complex origami fold logic, translucent watercolor wash, minimal manuscript, weightless fabric sketch
space-age fashion sketch, ruler-straight geometric ink lines, minimal flat vector-like marker wash, immaculate A-line geometry, 1960s mod-futurist drafting on smooth paper
industrial fashion manuscript, sharp reflective ink edges, shimmering metallic marker shading, precise chainmail modular assembly notes, hard-edged croquis, technical hardware draft
maximalist fashion illustration, heavily layered colored pencils, saturated watercolors, expressive doodle-like strokes, quirky 70s retro croquis, vintage sketchbook page
macabre gothic fashion sketch, heavily smudged emotional charcoal, razor-sharp aggressive graphite scratchings, profound dark romanticism manuscript, raw artist croquis, dark paper texture
